audit_items.proof_trace: Lines 174-176 check `if (usdPrice == 0) revert Errors.ZeroFeedData()` unconditionally after all decimal scaling (L167-172), on every iteration before `s_dataStreamsPrice` is written (L178). There is no code path from scaling to storage that bypasses this guard; feedDecimals==0 is independently rejected at configuration time (L253-255), preventing a misconfigured divisor from silently zeroing the price without the guard firing.
